title: Mizuho cuts GitLab stock price target on restructuring uncertainty
text: Mizuho reduced its price target on GitLab (NASDAQ: GTLB) from $30 to $26 while maintaining a Neutral rating. The analyst firm cited concerns about the company's Act 2 restructuring initiative as introducing additional near-term execution risk. The bank noted that GitLab's failure to disclose specifics about the restructuring, with details promised only at the June 2 earnings call, creates uncertainty ahead of earnings. Mizuho characterized the stock as a show-me story, suggesting investors should await better execution before giving credit.
